DialogManager – form() additional field types > should NOT submit when Enter is pressed in a textarea
DialogManager – _sanitiseHtml() strips dangerous content > strips <script> elements
DialogManager – _sanitiseHtml() strips dangerous content > strips inline on* event-handler attributes
DialogManager – _sanitiseHtml() strips dangerous content > strips onclick attribute
DialogManager – _sanitiseHtml() strips dangerous content > strips javascript: href URL
DialogManager – _sanitiseHtml() strips dangerous content > strips javascript: src attribute
DialogManager – _sanitiseHtml() strips dangerous content > preserves harmless attributes
DialogManager – _sanitiseHtml() strips dangerous content > strips <style> blocks (CSS injection vector)
DialogManager – _sanitiseHtml() strips dangerous content > strips <base> tags (base URL manipulation vector)
DialogManager – _sanitiseHtml() strips dangerous content > strips vbscript: href URLs
DialogManager – _sanitiseHtml() strips dangerous content > strips data: href URLs
DialogManager – _sanitiseHtml() strips dangerous content > strips xlink:href with javascript: URL
DialogManager – show() sanitises injected HTML > does not execute scripts injected via show()

DialogManager – constructor fallback to getElementById > should use document.getElementById("modalContainer") when no arg is given
DialogManager – prompt() empty-value submit is no-op > should not resolve when empty value is submitted, but resolve after a real value
DialogManager – form() plain string select options > should render options when passed as plain strings
DialogManager – form() plain string select options > should render option as selected when opt.selected is true
DialogManager – _collectFormData() missing input fallback > returns empty string for a field whose element is not in the form
DialogManager – _validateForm() missing input early return > does not throw and returns true when a required field has no DOM element

DialogManager – _validateForm() missing input early return > removes error class when non-required empty field is validated
